data.title: Implement PostToolUse hook to extract SUGGESTION: sentinel from sub-agent returns
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context
Implement story 95f8-7ec4: PostToolUse hook on Agent tool returns that extracts SUGGESTION: sentinels.

Read the full story context: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 95f8-7ec4

## Summary
Add a PostToolUse hook to plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/post-bash.sh (or post-all.sh) that intercepts Agent tool returns, extracts the first SUGGESTION: sentinel per return, and records it via suggestion-record.sh. Warn on malformed sentinel. Integrates with consolidated dispatcher architecture (CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN pattern).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Hook extracts first SUGGESTION: line per Agent tool return and calls suggestion-record.sh
- [ ] Warns on malformed sentinel (no crash)
- [ ] Hook registered in consolidated dispatcher
- [ ] Tests cover sentinel extraction edge cases
